Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c1 (seed+1) -- plump tabby cat curled asleep on a barrel, content and rounded, big soft ears, clean read despite a faint dark background shadow blob (removed by --trim). c0 was a multi-panel grid; c2 had a visible rectangular border frame around the scene (violates the border negative); c3 showed the cat sitting upright/alert rather than curled asleep.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) -- lit Sprite world sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true. Normal-map QA (windowed Sprite2D + textured PointLight2D pilot scene, deleted before commit, per art/pipeline/README.md) directly swept the light left/right on this asset -- bumps brightened toward the light on both sides, no caved-in/inverted relief. Passed on the existing Flip-Y-OFF import convention.
